name: fltrd.tech
description: Search and discovery tooling for technical content with semantic filtering.
problem: Finding the right technical notes and posts across fragmented sources is noisy and slow.

name: Miryn
description: A RAG and memory engine for grounded AI workflows.
problem: AI workflows lose context too easily and need better long-term memory primitives.

name: Stash
description: A browser extension for collecting and organizing useful web fragments.
problem: Good ideas disappear into tabs, screenshots, and scattered notes.

name: ChaiPaani
description: A warm local product experiment around food, discovery, and community.
problem: Independent local discovery products usually feel generic or disconnected from real neighborhood context.

name: Byline
description: Open-source multi-agent content engine for developer-founders who build in public.
problem: Builders ship work but lose visibility because posting about it is repetitive and high-friction.
